zh.Higham Gobion, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾希加姆 格比
zh.Knaptoft, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾可納普托福特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Gobion II於大約1180年出生在英國貝德福爾時，他的父親Richard Gobion I36歲，母親Beatrice Lucelles36歲。他和Agnes Merlay至少有4個兒子。他去世於1230年12月29日之前在法國加斯可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Gobion II于大约1180年出生在英国貝德福爾时，他的父亲Richard Gobion I36岁，母亲Beatrice Lucelles36岁。他和Agnes Merlay至少有4个儿子。他去世于1230年12月29日之前在法国加斯可。

nameMeanings.name: Gobion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Bhola, Boodram, Mohan, Narine, Parmanand, Pooran, Shiva.  French Andre, Marcelle, Pierre.
French: from a pet form of   Gobert  .

variants.name: Gobert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Antoine, Marie-France, Monique.

French, German, and English (London): from a medieval personal name, Godebert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was popularized in England by the Normans, and probably absorbed an Old English form Godbeorht.

variants.name: Goben
meanings: Altered form of Gobin , a surname of English or French origin. In some cases however, the surname Goben (possibly of German origin; see 2 below) was changed to Gobin.
German (Göben): habitational name from Gobbin on Rügen Island (Pomerania) or perhaps from any of several places called Goben in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Gobion II was born about 1180, in Bedfordshire, England, his father, Richard Gobion I, was 36 and his mother, Beatrice Lucelles, was 36. He had at least 4 sons with Agnes Merlay. He died before 29 December 1230, in Gascogne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Gobion II est né environ 1180, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Gobion I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Lucelles, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Agnes Merlay. Il est décédé avant 29 décembre 1230, à Gascogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Gobion II um 1180 in Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Gobion I 36 und seine Mutter Beatrice Lucelles 36. Er hatte mit Agnes Merlay mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 29. Dezember 1230 in Gascogne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Gobion II è nato il circa 1180 nel Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Gobion I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Lucelles, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Agnes Merlay. Morì prima del 29 dicembre 1230, nel Gascogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Gobion IIが約1180年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Gobion Iは36歳，母Beatrice Lucellesは36歳であった。彼はAgnes Merlayとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1230年12月29日以前にフランスガスコグンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Gobion II(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Gobion I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Lucelles(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Agnes Merlay(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 12월 29일 이전 프랑스 가스코그니에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Gobion II nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Gobion I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Lucelles, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Agnes Merlay. Ele faleceu antes 29 de dezembro de 1230, em Gascogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Gobion II родился около 1180 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Gobion I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Lucelles, 36. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Agnes Merlay. Он умер перед 29 декабрь 1230 г. в местности гаскогн, Франция.
